release_notes:
Alpha 4.0.10.34 - 2026-05-13 - Verify install (SHA-256 audit).

Extensive list of VIES, Intrastat and Exchange rates improvements.

NEW CRITICAL MODULE. API CONECTION for exchange rates.

New feature requested by Pablo after the 4.0.10.33 Delta Updater
redesign landed. Adds a 🔒 "Verify install" button in the Stage 1
sidebar (below "📂 Open folder") that audits the local install
against the latest published release ZIP and surfaces any drift —
the same way the RSI launcher's "Verify files" button does for
Star Citizen.

How it works:

1. Click 🔒 Verify install on the Stage 1 sidebar.
2. VerifyResultsDialog opens, runs `updater.verify_install()` on a
worker thread. Phases stream in real time through the bottom
status line:
downloading  →  verifying  →  comparing  →  done
3. The worker downloads the release ZIP referenced in the
manifest, validates its SHA-256 against `manifest["sha256"]`,
then for every file inside the ZIP:
• computes the file's SHA-256,
• looks up the matching local path under the install dir,
• buckets it as matched / mismatched / missing.
4. The dialog renders a colour-coded report:
✓ green  — install matches the latest release (nothing to do)
✗ red    — N file(s) differ; lists [≠] mismatched + [✗] missing
Filters out __pycache__, .pyc, .pyo, .DS_Store, .git,
_update_staging and .pytest_cache. Also handles release ZIPs
with a top-level wrapper folder (`Marosa-Magic-Tool-Alpha-
X.Y.Z-CLEAN-…/`) via `_find_staged_root_in_zip`.

When mismatches / missing files are reported the dialog enables an
"Update to fix →" button. Closing the dialog with that button sets
`dialog.result = "needs_update"` so a future caller (Stage 2 entry)
can pipe the user straight into the patch flow.

Public API additions:
- src/updater.py       : verify_install, _is_ignored,
_sha256_of_bytes,
_find_staged_root_in_zip
- src/delta_updater.py : class VerifyResultsDialog
(PatchNotesWindow gains manifest= kwarg
and a _run_verify_install method;
_build_sidebar gains verify_callback=)

Tests: +12 in tests/test_410_34_verify_install.py covering the
four updater helpers, verify_install end-to-end against a
synthesized ZIP (match + mismatch + missing), checksum-mismatch
abort, missing download_url branch, and source-level wiring of
the dialog + sidebar.

Suite: 474 passed, 4 skipped, 9 baseline failures unchanged.
